title: Sericocoma remotiflora
taxonomy: Sericocoma remotiflora belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Australia. Sericocoma remotiflora is a shrub that produces small white flowers. The classification of this plant is further divided into the genus Sericocoma and the order Caryophyllales. It is a part of the eudicot clade, a group of flowering plants that produce flowers with four or five petals.
